uplink.description: Status report — contact open, 3.6 V battery
uplink._note: Upstream R718F status frame: bytes[3]=36 -> 3.6 V, bytes[4]=1 (OnOff) -> contact open. Input bytes taken from the TTN upstream example; expected normalized data authored here.

uplink.description: Status report — contact closed, 3.0 V battery
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame: bytes[3]=30 -> 3.0 V, bytes[4]=0 (OnOff) -> contact closed.

uplink.description: Status report — contact open, low-battery flag set (2.4 V)
uplink._note: Synthetic: bytes[3]=152 (0x98) -> high bit set (low battery) + 0x18=24 -> 2.4 V; bytes[4]=1 -> contact open.
reportType (bytes[2]) == 0x00 is the version/datecode frame; carries no measurement. Input from TTN upstream startup example.

uplink.description: Config report response on fPort 7 — no measurement
uplink._note: fPort 7 carries configuration responses, not measurements. Input from TTN upstream ConfigReportRsp example.
Only fPort 6 carries data reports; any other data fPort is unsupported.
